items.claim: Max Holloway's ability to control distance and land kicks will fatigue Conor McGregor and lead to a win for Holloway.
items.quote: If Max plays the distance game a little bit and kicks Conor a little bit and gets some kind of a fatigue he's in trouble, dude.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's five-year layoff from competition is a significant hurdle to his performance.
items.quote: It's 5 years, Conor. It's not 2 years. It's not 3 years. It's not 4 years. It's 5 years, man.

items.claim: Conor McGregor retains the balance and speed necessary to compete at a high level.
items.quote: You can see the balance. You can see the speed is still there. You can see that it's still there. This man still got it.

items.claim: Tracy Cortez's opponent, Yaning Kong, is a high-level, dangerous fighter.
items.quote: That Chinese chick ain't no slouch. Ain't no joke.
